events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: this is a **fail** — backfill lifts thicker than the compactor's effective depth won't achieve uniform compaction (per IPC 306 and typical spec lift-thickness limits), risking voids/settlement and pipe damage. Since the work is only rough-complete, corrective action (remove oversized lift, re-place in compliant lifts, recompact, density-test) is called out before backfill proceeds to cover.
